mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_group
group_name = #{groupName}, avatar = #{avatar}, announcement = #{announcement}, max_members = #{maxMembers}, join_policy = #{joinPolicy}, invite_policy = #{invitePolicy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, group_name AS groupName, avatar, announcement, member_count AS memberCount, max_members AS maxMembers, join_policy AS joinPolicy FROM chat_group WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (group_name LIKE concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR announcement LIKE concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
